# btpservice_cicd_repositories (Data Source)

Lists all repositories in the SAP BTP CI/CD service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "btpservice_cicd_repositories" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the data source.
- `values` (Attributes List) The list of repositories. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values))

<a id="nestedatt--values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values`

Read-Only:

- `clone_credential_id` (String) ID of the credential used to authenticate against the Git server when cloning.
- `clone_url` (String) URL used to clone the repository.
- `cloud_connector_credential_id` (String) ID of the credential containing the Cloud Connector Location ID used for cloning.
- `event_receiver` (Attributes) Event receiver configuration for triggering builds via webhooks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values--event_receiver))
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the repository.
- `name` (String) Name of the repository.

<a id="nestedatt--values--event_receiver"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values.event_receiver`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether event processing is enabled.
- `scm_type` (String) Source code manager type.
- `webhook_id` (String) Immutable technical ID of the webhook.
- `webhook_token_credential_id` (String) ID of the webhook secret credential.
